name: code4food
description: code4food studio's Claude Code tooling: the lean dev Skillset and the Factory (autonomous spec-driven development).

plugins.name: code4food-skillset
plugins.description: Lean dev workflow: task sizing, explore/plan/TDD/verify/finishing discipline, debugging, worktrees, handoff — plus a code-reviewer agent, /commit, and a protected-branch guard hook.

plugins.name: code4food-factory
plugins.description: Factory — autonomous spec-driven development. Claude Code develops a fully-specced product alone in daily windows; skills cover speccing (multi-sitting interview + red-team pass, no factory machine required), setup (interview wizard), the backlog vocabulary, and headless verification for unattended sessions.
